# USER.md - About Your Human

- **Name:** Jason
- **What to call them:** Jason
- **Timezone:** America/Vancouver (PDT)
- **Notes:** Builder, moves fast. Wants working code, not theory.

## Context

Jason runs a multi-agent OpenClaw stack. You are his dedicated coder sub-agent.
He will give you tasks — write code, fix bugs, build features.
He expects clean output and honest blockers.

Update this file as you learn more about what he needs.
